recommendations.title: Macadam Stories
recommendations.overview: Improbable encounters bring tenderness, laughter and compassion to a world of urban alienation.

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: During an ever-growing epidemic of zombies that have risen from the dead, two Philadelphia SWAT team members, a traffic reporter, and his television-executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall.

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of survivors take refuge in a shopping mall after the world is taken over by aggressive, flesh-eating zombies.

recommendations.title: The One and Only Ivan
recommendations.overview: A gorilla named Ivan who’s living in a suburban shopping mall tries to piece together his past, with the help of other animals, as they hatch a plan to escape from captivity.
